---
name: Workflow Request
about: Request a new Claude-powered n8n workflow
title: "[WORKFLOW REQUEST] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: foryourselfsuryansh-cmd
---

## Workflow Idea

Describe the workflow you'd like added to this repo.

**What should it do?**
(e.g. "Scrape Reddit posts, use Claude to summarize sentiment, save to Google Sheets")

## Use Case

What business problem does this solve?
- [ ] Lead generation
- [ ] Customer support
- [ ] CRM / sales automation
- [ ] Social media
- [ ] Content creation
- [ ] Data processing / analysis
- [ ] Other: ___

## Tools / Services Involved

Which tools should this workflow use?
- [ ] Claude (Anthropic) — required for all workflows
- [ ] n8n built-in nodes
- [ ] Google Sheets / Gmail
- [ ] Apify
- [ ] Twilio / WhatsApp
- [ ] Slack
- [ ] Notion
- [ ] Airtable
- [ ] Other: ___

## Expected Inputs & Outputs

**Input:** (e.g. a Google Sheet with company names)
**Output:** (e.g. enriched sheet with Claude-generated summaries)

## Priority

How important is this to you?
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would use this regularly
- [ ] Critical for my business

## Are you willing to contribute it?

- [ ] Yes, I can build and submit a PR
- [ ] No, requesting for someone else to build
- [ ] I need help building it

## Additional Context

Any other details, inspiration, or links.
